dashboard.label: ZeroQ — Crypto Inventory
dashboard.description: Live TLS connections observed on the wire, indexed from Zeek ssl.log.

search.query: | index=crypto_net sourcetype=zeroq:tls_connection earliest=-7d risk=critical | stats count
| index=crypto_net sourcetype=zeroq:tls_connection earliest=-7d | stats count by version
| index=crypto_net sourcetype=zeroq:tls_connection earliest=-7d | sort - _time | table _time, server, src, dst, version, cipher, curve, risk, hosts
